title: Karinda
content:
{{Top|ga|ncl}} {{Unlicensed}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:KarindaValley-MilkRun.jpg]] |name=Karinda
{{C|Map of a valley on Karinda depicted}} |region=[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Karinda system/Legends|Karinda system]] |sector=[[Wazta sector/Legends|Wazta sector]] |system=[[Karinda system/Legends|Karinda system]]"[[Milk Run]]" |coordinates=J-18''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Karinda system/Legends|Karinda system]] |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate=[[Water/Legends|Arid]] |gravity= |terrain=Canyons |water=Small seas and lakes |interest=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation=Galactic Empire }} {{Quote|After making the pick up, you are to deliver the supplies to the site of the unfinished Karinda Outpost in the Karinda System.|The commander of the Tancon Rebel Alliance base, to a team of Rebel agents|}} '''Karinda''' was an [[Water/Legends|arid]], dusty [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that lay in the [[Wazta sector/Legends|Wazta sector]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] maintained a small [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] there, while the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] also constructed a hidden [[Karinda Outpost|listening outpost]] on the planet. At one point, the Rebel [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] ''[[Arion Star]]'' [[Mission to Karinda|delivered]] supplies to the outpost, with the [[Freighter/Legends|starship's]] crew experiencing in the process both a rough landing on Karinda and pursuit by an Imperial force from the garrison. ==Description== Karinda was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Karinda system/Legends|Karinda system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Wazta sector/Legends|Wazta sector]]. It was situated at a distance of two [[Standard day/Legends|days']] travel with a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] equipped with a Class 1 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] from [[Greyman's Planet]] in the [[Soarin system]]. Karinda was an [[Water/Legends|arid]] world that appeared predominantly [[Color/Legends|red]]-brown in color when viewed from [[Realspace/Legends|space]], although it also had some small seas and lakes. Its surface featured canyons and a dusty soil with no [[Plant/Legends|vegetation]]. ==History== [[File:Wazta_sector.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Both Karinda and Greyman's Planet were situated in the Wazta sector.]] During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], the Empire maintained a [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] on Karinda. The Alliance was also constructing a listening outpost, the [[Karinda Outpost]], on the planet for intercepting Imperial Outer Rim communications. At some point between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],"[[Milk Run]]" is set between the events of {{Film|IV}} and {{Film|V}}, which corresponds to the [[Time/Legends|time]] period between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. the Alliance formulated a plan for a [[Mission to Karinda|mission]] to deliver supplies from [[Da'Harrin Spaceport]] on Greyman's Planet to the Karinda Outpost. At the Alliance base on the [[Koradin sector/Legends|Koradin sector]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Tancon system/Legends|Tancon system]] planet [[Tancon]], the coordinates for Karinda were loaded in the [[Navigation computer/Legends|navigation computer]] of the [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] ''[[Arion Star]]'', and afterward the base's [[Unidentified Rebel Alliance commander (Tancon)|commander]] briefed a team of agents on the mission. {{RPG|"[[Milk Run]]"}} After the Rebel team eventually retrieved the supplies from Greyman's Planet—in the process engaging in [[Space warfare/Legends|combat]] an Imperial patrol—it traveled to Karinda. However, when the ''Arion Star'' began its descent toward the Karinda Outpost, its [[Guidance system/Legends|guidance system]] control board malfunctioned, leading to the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] performing a rough landing in a valley an [[Standard hour/Legends|hour's]] travel away from the base. [[File:74ZMilitarySpeederBike-SW2Indy.png|thumb|left|300px|On Karinda, the Rebel agents were pursued by Imperial scout troopers (a scout trooper pictured).]] There, since the Rebels did not know the exact location of the outpost, they waited for the arrival of an [[Ultra-Light Assault Vehicle/Legends|Ultra-Light Assault Vehicle]] [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] and a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] [[Skiff/Legends|skiff]] that would bring them to the facility. The Rebels then loaded the supplies on the skiff, but before they could begin their trip, they were discovered in the valley by [[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]]–riding [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout troopers]] of the Imperial garrison, which had been notified of the Rebels' arrival after the Empire had traced them there from Greyman's Planet. A pursuit through the valley and the adjoining canyon ensued, with an Imperial [[Swift Assault 5|hoverscout]] later also joining the chase. Ultimately, the Rebel team was able to prevail over the Imperial force and deliver the supplies to the Karinda Outpost. {{Endgame}} ==Locations== Karinda was the site of a Galactic Empire garrison that—due to the world's remote location in the Outer Rim making it hardly worth Imperial attention—was small. The Rebel Alliance Karinda Outpost was constructed in a large [[Cave/Legends|cave]] that lay at the end of a canyon which began near a large [[Stone/Legends|rocky]] [[Mountain/Legends|hill]]. At a distance of an hour's travel with a speeder from the outpost was situated a small rocky valley that was connected via a narrow canyon to a large, open dusty plain. ==Behind the scenes== Karinda appeared in the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' adventure "[[Milk Run]]," which was written by [[Sterling Hershey]] and was run by the [[RPGA]] Network at the [[1991]] [[Wikipedia:Gen Con|Gen Con]] gaming convention.{{WebCite|url=https://www.sterlinghershey.com/freelance|text=freelance — STERLING HERSHEY|archivedate=20240122010627}} The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Karinda [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square J-18. ==Appearances== {{Indexpage}} ===Non-canon appearances=== *"[[Milk Run]]" {{Reprint|Milk Run}} {{Un}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Galactic Empire planets]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]] [[Category:Wazta sector locations]]
